description: Canonical 96 by 54, 24 fps, 96-frame AV1 WebM source for the first editorial slice.

provenance.source: Authored and generated in the Superi repository from the deterministic FFmpeg testsrc2 source.
provenance.author: Superi contributors
provenance.rights: Original synthetic image sequence approved for unrestricted redistribution.

generator.name: ffmpeg
generator.command: ffmpeg -f lavfi -i testsrc2=size=96x54:rate=24:duration=4 -frames:v 96 -c:v libsvtav1 -preset 12 -crf 35 -threads 1 -pix_fmt yuv420p -color_range tv -colorspace bt709 -color_primaries bt709 -color_trc bt709 -an -map_metadata -1 -fflags +bitexact -flags:v +bitexact -f webm input.webm
